---
title: Getting started with PyTorch
aliases:
  - top_intro.html
description: An introductory course to deep learning with &nbsp;[![](pt/img/logo_pytorch.svg){width="1.1em"}](https://pytorch.org/)
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{.topdef}

This introductory course to deep learning and neural networks offers a high-level explanation of concepts before diving into simple applications using the [PyTorch](https://pytorch.org/) framework. It does not assume any prior knowledge in machine learning. Some basic [Python](https://www.python.org/) is useful, but not strictly necessary.

:::

<br>
[[Start course ➤](pt/pt_intro.qmd)]{.topinline}
